query_normalized: assessing orbital period dependence of the exoplanet radius gap physics
rationale: This paper directly measures the same physical observable (exoplanet radius gap/valley) and its dependence on orbital period, satisfying acceptance criteria (a) same-mechanism evidence and (b) independent variable on the same domain. It also discusses the underlying physics mechanisms (photoevaporation, core-powered mass loss) that the user's question explicitly asks about.
